fundamentals.latest_results_summary: TCS reported strong double-digit growth in digital services. The operating margin remained resilient at 24.5% despite macroeconomic headwinds.

news.title: TCS Secures Mega Deal with European Bank
news.content: Tata Consultancy Services announced a multi-year partnership to modernize the core banking systems of a leading European bank.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: HDFC Bank showcased robust credit growth across retail and corporate segments. Net interest margins stabilized.

news.title: HDFC Expands Branch Network
news.content: HDFC Bank plans to open 500 new branches in semi-urban and rural areas to drive financial inclusion.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: ICICI Bank reported record profits driven by high net interest margins (4.1%) and strong fee income.

news.title: ICICI Bank Launches New Digital Lending Platform
news.content: ICICI unveiled a fully digital lending platform offering instant personal and business loans.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: Reliance Industries reported record earnings, driven by strong performance in its Jio telecom and retail divisions.

news.title: Reliance Jio Announces 6G Roadmap
news.content: Reliance Jio unveiled its 6G strategy, committing $2B towards next-generation network infrastructure.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: Infosys guided for steady revenue growth of 4-6% in constant currency, with margin expansion expected in the second half.

news.title: Infosys Wins Cloud Migration Contract
news.content: Infosys signed a definitive agreement with a US healthcare giant for a massive cloud migration project.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: Wipro reported a slight revenue decline in Q1 but management remains confident on the turnaround strategy.

news.title: Wipro Appoints New Head of AI Operations
news.content: Wipro continues its internal restructuring by appointing a new global head to drive enterprise AI adoption.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: State Bank of India posted its highest ever quarterly profit, boosted by a sharp drop in non-performing assets.

news.title: SBI Reduces Home Loan Rates
news.content: SBI announced a festive season discount on home loans, reducing rates by 15 basis points.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: Bharti Airtel saw robust average revenue per user (ARPU) growth, fueled by premium subscriber additions.

news.title: Airtel Expands 5G Coverage to 500 New Towns
news.content: Bharti Airtel successfully rolled out its 5G plus network to an additional 500 tier-2 and tier-3 towns.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: ITC reported steady FMCG volume growth and a strong recovery in its hospitality business segment.

news.title: ITC Hotel Demerger Completed
news.content: ITC officially completed the demerger of its hotel business, unlocking significant shareholder value.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: Hindustan Unilever observed a resurgence in rural demand, leading to a 5% underlying volume growth.

news.title: HUL Invests in D2C Brands
news.content: HUL announced strategic investments in two rising Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) wellness and personal care brands.
